input: Prove that for all natural numbers n, n + 0 = n
output: theorem add_zero (n : Nat) : n + 0 = n := by

input: theorem add_zero (n : Nat) : n + 0 = n := by
output:
induction n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n ih => rw [Nat.add_succ, ih]

input: Prove that for all natural numbers m n, m + n = n + m
output: theorem add_comm (m n : Nat) : m + n = n + m := by

input: theorem add_comm (m n : Nat) : m + n = n + m := by
output:
induction n with
  | zero => rw [Nat.add_zero]
  | succ n ih => rw [Nat.add_succ, ih, Nat.succ_add]

input: Prove that for all natural numbers n, 0 * n = 0

output:
induction n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n ih => rw [Nat.mul_succ, ih, Nat.zero_add]

input: Prove that the square root of 2 is irrational
output: theorem sqrt_two_irrational : ¬∃ p q : Nat, p * p = 2 * (q * q) := by

input: theorem sqrt_two_irrational : ¬∃ p q : Nat, p * p = 2 * (q * q) := by
output:
rintro ⟨p, q, h⟩
  have := Nat.prime_two.dvd_mul.1 (by rw [←h]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right _ p)
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := this
  have := Nat.prime_two.dvd_mul.1 (by rw [←h, hk]; apply Nat.dvd_mul_right _ q)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := this
  rw [←hk, ←hl, mul_comm] at h
  linarith

input: Prove that for any sets A and B, A ∩ B ⊆ A
output: theorem inter_subset_left (A B : Set α) : A ∩ B ⊆ A := by

input: theorem inter_subset_left (A B : Set α) : A ∩ B ⊆ A := by
Prove De Morgan's law: complement of (A ∪ B) = complement of A ∩ complement of B
output: theorem complement_union (A B : Set α) : (A ∪ B)ᶜ = Aᶜ ∩ Bᶜ := by

input: theorem complement_union (A B : Set α) : (A ∪ B)ᶜ = Aᶜ ∩ Bᶜ := by
output:
ext x
  constructor
  · intro h
    constructor
    · intro ha
      apply h
      left
      assumption
    · intro hb
      apply h
      right
      assumption
  · intro h ha hb
    apply h
    cases ha
    · left
      assumption
    · right
      assumption

input: Prove that for any real numbers x and y, |x + y| ≤ |x| + |y|
output: theorem abs_add (x y : ℝ) : |x + y| ≤ |x| + |y| := by

input: theorem abs_add (x y : ℝ) : |x + y| ≤ |x| + |y| := by
output:
cases (le_total 0 (x + y)) with
  | h1 =>
    calc
      |x + y| = x + y := by rw [abs_of_nonneg h1]
      _ ≤ |x| + y := by sorry
      _ ≤ |x| + |y| := by sorry
  | h1 =>
    have h2 : -(x + y) ≥ 0 := by linarith
    calc
      |x + y| = -(x + y) := by rw [abs_of_nonpos h1]
      _ = (-x) + (-y) := by ring
      _ ≤ |x| + |y| := by sorry

input: Prove that for any natural number n, the sum of the first n natural numbers is n(n+1)/2
output: theorem sum_nat (n : Nat) : ∑ i in Finset.range (n + 1), i = n * (n + 1) / 2 := by

input: theorem sum_nat (n : Nat) : ∑ i in Finset.range (n + 1), i = n * (n + 1) / 2 := by
output:
induction n with
  | zero =>
    rw [Finset.range_zero, Finset.sum_empty, Nat.zero_mul]
    rfl
  | succ n ih =>
    rw [Finset.range_succ, Finset.sum_insert, ih, Nat.add_succ_div_two]
    · linarith
    · intro h
      rw [Finset.mem_range] at h
      linarith
